meta.title: SIT Copilot
meta.subtitle:
Before-During-After Lecture Support with Source-Only QA
講義の前・中・後を一貫支援
meta.affiliation: Shibaura Institute of Technology / 芝浦工業大学

problems: 講義前: 難所や必要支援が見えず受講判断が難しい
講義中: 情報密度と話速が高く聞き漏らしが発生する
講義後: 回答根拠の追跡が難しく復習効率が落ちる
既存ツールは講義文脈に閉じた根拠付きQAを主軸にしていない
audience: 聞き漏らしが多い学生
アクセシビリティ配慮が必要な受講者

features.name: Captioning Pipeline
features.description: Azure AI Speech + Azure OpenAI (gpt-5-nano, operation record on gpt-4.1-nano) for subtitle transformation and correction.

features.name: Source-Only QA Pipeline
features.description: Azure AI Search + BM25 retrieval, source-only answer generation, and LLM-as-a-Judge verification with chunk_id citation.

features.name: ASR Correction Pipeline
features.description: ASR correction candidate is judged conservatively before adoption to prioritize safety.

prompts.name: Summary
prompts.content: Summarize the latest 60 seconds with source tags (speech/slide/board) and keep output concise for lecture follow-up.

prompts.name: QA
prompts.content: Use only lecture sources. Cite chunk_id. If evidence is insufficient, answer that it cannot be verified in this lecture.

prompts.name: Verifier
prompts.content: Judge each claim against cited sources and reject unsupported or contradictory claims in JSON format.

highlights: Caption latency target achieved in both language modes
Source-only QA with chunk-level citations implemented
QA latency target (<5s) unmet and explicitly disclosed
ASR correction adoption remains a known constraint
promptHighlights: Explicit source-only contract in QA prompt
Verifier JSON flow for claim-level grounding check
Fallback behavior is visible and fail-closed
Human review loop drives prompt and threshold updates

shortTerm: Reduce QA E2E latency with time-budgeted retrieval/answer/verify path
Retune ASR correction judge threshold with monitoring
longTerm: Deploy repeatable benchmark harness for lecture QA
Scale to practical classroom operation with stable SLAs
